column1: # FlightRadar - custom 16 MB partition table for the Waveshare ESP32-S3-Touch-LCD-7
# (ESP32-S3-N16R8: 16 MB flash). The Arduino IDE (arduino-esp32) automatically
# uses a partitions.csv found in the sketch folder
# in Tools > Partition Scheme. We need a layout that has BOTH:
#   * two OTA app slots (app0/app1) so web OTA updates work
#   * a data partition labelled "spiffs" so LittleFS mounts and the coastline
#     cache survives reboots (no more "partition spiffs could not be found").
# Two 3 MB app slots leave ~9.8 MB for the LittleFS cache.
# NOTE: the IDE's "Sketch uses X%" figure comes from the Tools > Partition Scheme

column3: so keep that menu on any scheme whose app slot is >= 3 MB

column1: # (e.g. "16M Flash (3MB APP/9.9MB FATFS)") for an accurate size report.
